SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-31-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR, RM 103.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-05-2008 - CONTINUED TO FEB-03-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES ARE PRESENT, HOWEVER THE PLAINTIFF DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. CONTINUED FOR COMMISSIONER SLAVIT TO HEAR CASE. JUDGE PRO TEM: SASHA CUMMINGS. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SUBPOENA RETURNED AND FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-10-2009 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT **GREEN CARD RETURNED ON 10/29/08, WAS SIGNED BY RIA TUCCIO, ENVELOPE WAS NOT OPENED** COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT BUCHBENDER, MARTIN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-03-2009 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO FEB-10-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. CROSS-DEFENDANT DEEMED SERVED WITH CROSS-COMPLAINT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-10-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-10-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BUCHBENDER, MARTIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HARTMAN, KAREN (THE COURT DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFF'S RECOVERY FOR THE SPECIFIED SERVICES WAS LIMITED TO PAYMENTS AVAILABLE THROUGH WORKER'S COMPENSATION.) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY DEFENDANT HARTMAN, KAREN AS TO PLAINTIFF BUCHBENDER, MARTIN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT HARTMAN, KAREN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT BUCHBENDER, MARTIN (ANY PENALTY UNDER LABOR CODE SECTION 3751 IS BASED ON THE COLLECTION OF MONEY FROM THE EMPLOYER. IN THIS CASE NO MONEY WAS ACTUALLY TAKEN FROM DEFENDANT HARTMAN.) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
